hero.transcribeDescription: Transcribe an existing audio file with the selected model.
hero.historyDescription: Log of all your transcriptions (local SQLite).
hero.modelsDescription: Pick the transcription source at the top. The matching panel shows below.
hero.enhancementDescription: Route every transcription through an LLM (local or cloud) before paste.
hero.powerModeDescription: Context-aware profiles that switch prompt + LLM + source per active app.
hero.permissionsDescription: Parla checks the system access it needs to work correctly.
hero.hardwareCpu: Hardware: no NVIDIA GPU detected, CPU execution

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Overview of your Parla setup and recent activity.
dashboard.heroEmpty: Your Parla journey starts with your first recording.
dashboard.historyHint: See the History panel to search, export or delete.

settings.title: Settings
settings.languageDescription: The UI language. Restart the app to fully apply in all panels.
settings.autostartDescription: Start Parla automatically when you log in to Windows.
settings.closeToTrayDescription: When you click the X on the main window, Parla keeps running in the background (system tray). Right-click the tray icon and pick 'Quit Parla' to fully exit.
settings.recordingDescription: Audio behavior while you are dictating.
settings.systemMuteDescription: Silences speakers / headphones when you start recording so notifications and videos don't leak into the transcript. The original mute state is restored when you stop.
settings.resumeDelayDescription: How long to wait after recording stops before un-muting the system audio. Useful if the hotkey release clicks through to an app that plays a sound.
settings.recorderStyleInfo: 'Mini' shows a floating pill at the bottom of the screen. 'Notch' drops down from the top like the MacBook Pro notch.
settings.recorderStyleMiniCaption: Bottom of the screen, floating pill.
settings.recorderStyleNotchCaption: Drops from the top of the screen.
settings.appendTrailingSpaceDescription: Add a space after the pasted text so your next word doesn't stick.
settings.restoreClipboardDescription: Restore your previous clipboard content (images, text, files) after the dictation is pasted.
settings.textFormattingDescription: Apply sentence case, capitalization and punctuation cleanup.

welcome.title: Welcome to Parla
welcome.subtitle: Voice dictation for Windows, local or cloud.
welcome.description: Local and cloud voice dictation for Windows. We will quickly configure the microphone, OCR and keyboard shortcut. It takes less than 2 minutes.

permissions.title: Microphone access
permissions.description: Parla needs access to your microphone to record your voice. You can manage this in Windows privacy settings.

model.title: Pick a transcription model
model.description: Whisper base is a good default. You can always change it later from the AI Models panel.

hotkey.title: Set your hotkey
hotkey.description: The default is Right Alt. Press and hold to record, release to stop. A short tap enters hands-free mode.

ready.title: You're all set!
ready.description: Press the hotkey and start dictating. Your text will be pasted at the cursor.

step.microphoneDescription: Parla needs access to your microphone to record your dictation. If no device is detected, open Windows Settings > Privacy > Microphone.
step.ocrDescription: Used to analyze the active window contents and enrich LLM prompts. Install a language pack with OCR in Windows Settings > Time and language > Language.
step.autostartDescription: Launch Parla when Windows starts, so your hotkey is always available.
step.hotkeyDescription: Parla listens to a global shortcut to trigger recording. Default: Right Alt (hold or double-tap depending on the mode). You can reconfigure it in Settings.

history.title: History
history.description: Your past dictations. Click the copy icon to grab any text, or Export CSV to save the full log.
history.descriptionFull: Transcription log (local SQLite). Search covers raw and enhanced text.
history.emptyHint: Start a recording and your transcripts will appear here.
history.emptyLong: No transcription. Start a recording to begin.
history.confirmClear: Delete all history? This cannot be undone.
history.retentionHelp: Only one mode active at a time (transcription deletion supersedes audio-only deletion). Runs at startup and every 24h.

sources.localDescription: Whisper models running on your machine. 100% offline.
sources.cloudDescription: Cloud providers for fast transcription. Requires API key.
sources.parakeetDescription: NVIDIA Parakeet TDT via ONNX Runtime. Fast and multilingual.

transcriptionSource.title: Transcription source
transcriptionSource.description: Pick between local Whisper, NVIDIA Parakeet or a cloud provider. Clicking a tile shows the models for that source. The pipeline keeps using the active source (tile with 'active') until you activate a new model.

models.title: AI Models
models.description: Pick the transcription source used by default. Power Mode profiles can override this per app.

whisperModels.title: Whisper models
whisperModels.description: Local transcription via whisper.cpp. Models are downloaded from huggingface.co/ggerganov/whisper.cpp (same versions as VoiceInk).
whisperModels.importDescription: Add a local .bin GGML file (fine-tune, custom quantization, etc.)

parakeet.title: Parakeet (NVIDIA NeMo)
parakeet.description: Local transcription via Parakeet TDT 0.6B models. Run with ONNX Runtime. Fast alternative to Whisper large when an NVIDIA GPU is available.
parakeet.cpuHint: Enable the Cargo feature cuda-onnx (NVIDIA) or directml-onnx (Windows GPU) for acceleration.

llmLocal.title: Local LLM (llama.cpp)
llmLocal.description: GGUF models run locally. Select 'llama.cpp (local)' as LLM provider in the Enhancement panel to use the model selected below.
llmLocal.nGpuLayersHelp: 0 = CPU, 1000 = all on GPU (if CUDA active)

cloud.keysDescription: Configure at least one key to unlock the cloud models below. Keys are stored in Windows Credential Manager.
cloud.modelsDescription: Click a model to select it as the transcription source. Models whose API key is not configured are disabled.

enhancement.title: LLM Enhancement
enhancement.description: Applies an LLM prompt (cleanup, rewording) after transcription, before paste. Applies the active prompt rules.
enhancement.enableDescription: When on, transcribed text goes through the chosen LLM before paste.
enhancement.localcliHelpA: The pi/claude/codex templates expect the command to be in PATH. The CLI is launched via
enhancement.customModelPlaceholder: exact model name expected by the endpoint

screenContext.title: Active window context (OCR)
screenContext.description: Captures the screen + OCR at record start. Injects the text in the system prompt under

promptEditor.title: Custom prompts
promptEditor.predefinedDescription: Predefined prompt: edits are allowed but it will be restored if deleted.
promptEditor.customDescription: The custom prompt will be used for LLM enhancement of transcriptions.
promptEditor.injectWrapper: Inject into the Transcription Enhancer template
promptEditor.injectWrapperHelp: Uncheck for direct assistant mode (the prompt is used as-is without a wrapper).
promptEditor.triggerWordsHelp: Activate this prompt automatically when the transcript contains one of these words.

powerMode.title: Power Mode
powerMode.description: Automatically activates a profile (prompt + LLM + transcription source) based on the foreground app or URL at record time.
powerMode.autoRestoreDescription: When on, Parla reapplies the original settings at the end.
powerMode.emptyList: No configurations. Click "New config" to get started.
powerMode.promptAppName: Exe name (without .exe) - e.g.: chrome, code, notepad
powerMode.sheetDescription: Automatically activates a profile (prompt + LLM + source) based on the foreground app or URL.
powerMode.language: Language (whisper code: en, fr, empty for auto)

recorder.title: Recorder
recorder.description: Configure your audio device, hotkey and visualization style.
recorder.recordingDescription: WASAPI 16 kHz mono Int16 capture, triggered by Right Alt (hold for PTT, tap for hands-free mode)

transcribe.title: Local transcription
transcribe.description: Run Whisper on the last recorded WAV with the selected model

postProcessing.title: Text post-processing
postProcessing.description: Filters applied after transcription, before paste at the cursor
postProcessing.formatParagraphsDescription: 50-word chunking, max 4 meaningful sentences per paragraph
postProcessing.removeFillersDescription: Strips uh, um, hm, etc. based on the list below
postProcessing.appendSpaceDescription: Adds ' ' after the pasted text (useful when chaining with other words)
postProcessing.restoreClipboardDescription: Saves and restores the text clipboard around the paste
postProcessing.fillersDefault: VoiceInk default: uh, um, uhm, umm, uhh, uhhh, hmm, hm, mmm, mm, mh, ehh

dictionary.title: Personal dictionary
dictionary.description: Replacements applied after transcription. Variants are comma-separated. Non-spaced scripts (CJK, Thai) use a substring fallback.
dictionary.empty: No entry. Add a first replacement to standardize the output.

vad.title: Silero VAD
vad.description: Voice Activity Detection: ignores silences and only transcribes speech segments, like VoiceInk (ggml-silero-v5.1.2).
vad.installed: The Silero model is installed. Toggle to enable/disable.
vad.downloadFirst: Download the model first so you can enable it.

permissions.intro: Current state of permissions and system dependencies.
permissions.microphoneTip: If Parla sees no microphone, open Windows Settings > Privacy > Microphone and allow desktop apps to access it. Also check the mic is plugged in and selected in Audio Input.
permissions.ocrDescription: Read the active window text for enhancement.
permissions.ocrTip: OCR uses the active Windows language pack. Add the language you want (French, English, etc.) in Windows Settings > Time and language > Language, then download the 'Optional OCR language pack'.
permissions.hotkeyDescription: Capture the Push-to-Talk shortcut anywhere in Windows.
permissions.hotkeyTip: Parla installs a low-level WH_KEYBOARD_LL hook which does not require special permissions on Windows. The default shortcut is Right Alt.

miniRecorder.noConfigs: No config defined. Create a profile so Parla automatically switches prompt + LLM + source based on the active app.
miniRecorder.autoSwitch: Switches automatically based on the current app.

errors.timeout: Request timed out. Check your network connection.
